title: OpenAI will delay GPT-5.6 after Trump administration request
author: Hayden Field
raw_description: The Trump administration, apprehensive of potential security issues, has reportedly asked OpenAI to stagger the release of its next big-ticket model, GPT-5.6. The Information reported that OpenAI CEO Sam Altman told employees Wednesday in a company Q&A that it would release GPT-5.6 in limited preview form - granting access only to a small group of […]
summary: 据报道，特朗普政府因担忧安全问题，要求OpenAI推迟发布GPT-5.6。OpenAI CEO Sam Altman在内部会议中表示，将先以有限预览形式发布，仅向小部分用户开放。
analysis_note: 内容为行业新闻，涉及模型发布延迟，但缺乏技术细节，相关性中等。
